name: emem
tagline: Verifiable Earth observation for AI agents. Three foundation encoders, one consensus, every answer cryptographically signed.
description: Content-addressed, ed25519-signed Earth memory protocol. Every fact lives at (cell, band, tslot); canonical CBOR hashes to a BLAKE3 content ID; every read returns a signed receipt verifiable in-browser at /verify without trusting the issuer. Auto-materializes on miss from open data — any cell on Earth answers without pre-seeding. Foundation embeddings live: Clay v1.5 (1024-D), Prithvi-EO-2.0 (1024-D), Tessera (128-D / 1024-D multi_year), Galileo Tiny (192-D). The `clay_prithvi_tessera_triple_consensus@1` algorithm votes across three encoders with independent receptive-field aliasing; six domain variants exercise the pattern for deforestation, wetland change, urban expansion, disaster anomaly, climate archetype, and coastal erosion. 49 MCP tools, 155 algorithms, 35 band cube slots, 118 materializer-wired band names, 43 source schemes, 12 data connectors. Live geocoder cascade: wide-bbox → embedded gazetteer → GeoNames cities-5000 (68 581 places, in-process) → sled cache → Photon → Nominatim, with Overture `divisions/division_area` polygons for admin boundaries. Signed Absence: when a band has no data at a cell, the responder returns a signed Absence fact with a typed reason — not a 404. cell64 is a ~9.54 m × ~9.55 m grid at the equator, matching Sentinel-1/2 native pitch.

domain_shortcuts._purpose: One-shot locate → recall → polygon-aggregate per place name. REST and MCP equivalents.

address_algebra.cell: 64-bit cell identifier — 21-bit lat × 22-bit lng on the active grid (~9.54 m × ~9.55 m at the equator, matching Sentinel-1/Sentinel-2 native pitch). Wire form: four base-1024 bigrams separated by dots, Hilbert-ordered so neighbours share string prefixes.
address_algebra.tslot: u64 bucket of the Unix timeline at the band's tempo cadence (slot_seconds = 86400 fast / 2592000 medium / 31536000 slow / 3600 ultra_fast / 0 static). Equal across responders for the same band.
address_algebra.band: logical channel within a 1792-D embedding contract; loaded from content-addressed `bands_cid` manifest. 35 cube slots; 118 (slot × subkey) materializer-wired band names auto-fetchable on miss.

crypto.hash: BLAKE3 over canonical CBOR (deterministic CIDs across responders)
crypto.signature: ed25519 over (request_id | served_at | primitive | cells, | fact_cids,)
crypto.verify_path: in-browser via /verify or /verify/{fact_cid} using @noble/curves + @noble/hashes; no callback to issuer

foundation_encoders._purpose: Four GPU encoders co-resident on a 20 GB VRAM budget; surfaced as their own bands AND woven into algorithm consensus voting.

galileo_tiny.input: Sentinel-2 only modality wired today (multimodal scaffold present)

jepa_v2_dynamics.honest_behaviour: returns last_attested_vintage; receipt carries `via: short_circuit_untrained` and `untrained_baseline` warning

consensus_algorithms.purpose: Year-on-year change detection via cosine distance per encoder, ensemble L2-mean, agreement classifier at gate=0.15 (tunable via parameters block).
Forest-loss-tuned consensus with Hansen GFC mask uplift to `hansen_confirmed` verdict at gate=0.20.
Wetland-tuned consensus, Tessera leg substituted by JRC GSW recurrence delta at gate=0.10.
New-construction consensus with Overture buildings delta + S2 B11 SWIR corroboration at gate=0.20.
Spatial-anomaly consensus — cell vs 8-neighbour mean per encoder, adaptive z-score gate (2-σ over neighbour distribution).
12-class Köppen-Geiger classifier with per-encoder centroids seeded from Beck et al. 2018 type localities.
Coastline-clamped consensus — bathymetry clamp restricts execution to active-coastline cells (-5 m ≤ depth ≤ +5 m).

ask_intents._purpose: When /v1/ask classifies the question as Similarity or Change, the response carries a `foundation_embeddings` envelope with per-encoder neighbour lists and cross-encoder consensus voting. Additive — non-matching questions keep the topic-router scalar response.

honest_limits: No commercial sub-meter imagery — Sentinel-2 (10 m) is the finest native pitch wired today.
Single-host deployment — no federation, no global routing, no SOC 2.
JEPA v2 dynamics is untrained; the endpoint short-circuits to the last attested vintage and signs the receipt with `untrained_baseline`.
Tessera multi-vintage coverage is upstream-rate-limited; only 2024 reliably serves today.
12 wired data connectors; bands without a registered materializer appear under `declared_but_no_materializer_at_this_responder`.
